headline: Stock Market Today: Dow Slumps 600 Points As Oil Prices Spike 11%; This Broadcom Rival Soars (Live Coverage)
summary: Stock Market Today: The Dow Jones index dived 700 points Friday on surging oil prices and a shockingly weak jobs report. Nvidia dropped.

headline: Datadog Ties Sakana AI And New Director To Enterprise AI Growth
summary: Datadog (NasdaqGS:DDOG) has formed a partnership with Sakana AI to support enterprise AI adoption, initially targeting large customers in Japan with plans to broaden globally. The company has added Dominic Phillips, a finance executive with experience at Samsara and ServiceNow, to its board of directors. These moves come as enterprises look for tools to deploy and manage AI powered applications at scale. For investors watching Datadog at a current share price of $122.36, the company’s...

headline: Amazon says Anthropic’s Claude still OK for AWS customers to use outside defense work
summary: Amazon joined Microsoft and Google in continue to offer Anthropic's Claude AI technology to customers after the Pentagon deemed it a "supply chain risk."

headline: 2 Unprofitable Stocks on Our Buy List and 1 We Brush Off
summary: Unprofitable companies can burn through cash quickly, leaving investors exposed if they fail to turn things around. Without a clear path to profitability, these businesses risk running out of capital or relying on dilutive fundraising.

headline: The Zacks Analyst Blog Highlights Datadog's, Dynatrace and Elastic
summary: Datadog's AI-driven momentum boosts enterprise growth and deal activity, outpacing observability rivals Dynatrace and Elastic.
